text_blocks.text: "home", respectively, are examples of Geordie words with
origins in Scandinavia; barn and hjem are the
corresponding modern Norwegian and Danish words.
Some words used in the Geordie dialect are used
elsewhere in the Northern United Kingdom. The words

used elsewhere in Northern England. Many words,
